body:
Replace per-query psycopg2 connections with SQLAlchemy connection pool. Extract duplicate queries into shared module.

**Scope:**
- Create shared SQLAlchemy engine with connection pooling
- Replace raw psycopg2 opens in student_api.py, showcase_api.py, wji_api.py
- Extract common queries (skills fetch, profile lookup) into `agents/database/queries.py`
- Add read-only engine for reporting/dashboard queries
- Migrate to ORM for standard CRUD; keep raw SQL for complex analytics

**Current state:** Each API call opens/closes a new connection. Same queries duplicated across 3 API files.
title: refactor: SQLAlchemy connection pool + shared query layer
